  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      from collections import defaultdict
  
      by_subject = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          by_subject[t.subject].append(t)
  
      primary_subject = triples[0].subject
      for s in by_subject:
          if "airport" in s.lower():
              primary_subject = s
              break
  
      def clean_language(x: str) -> str:
          if x.lower().endswith(" language"):
              return x[:-9]
          return x
  
      def short_subject_for_country(s: str, country_obj: str) -> str:
          if ", " in s:
              left, right = s.rsplit(", ", 1)
              if right.strip().lower() == country_obj.strip().lower():
                  return left.strip()
          return s
  
      def render(t: Triple) -> str:
          s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object

It is a program that converts a list of triples into natural language text. The given triples will be associated with the topic: Airport. The program must implement a function called 'predict' that accepts a list of triples and generates a coherent, contextually relevant sentence that accurately represents the information contained in the triples. Ensure that the generated text is fluent, grammatically correct, and maintains the meaning of the original data. There can be multiple triples given that make up a complex sentence. from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:

        return ""

    predicate_templates = {

        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda s, o: f"{s} has an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",

        "5thRunwayNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a fifth runway numbered {o}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a fifth runway surface type of {o}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the ICAO location identifier {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the IATA location identifier {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the location identifier {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is natively known as {o}",
        "leaderParty": lambda s, o: f"{s} is led by the {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"the capital of {s} is {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{o} is spoken in {s}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"the official language of {s} is {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"the leader of {s} is {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda s, o: f"the largest city of {s} is {o}",
        "countySeat": lambda s, o: f"the county seat of {s} is {o}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the administrative arrondissement of {o}",
        "mayor": lambda s, o: f"the mayor of {s} is {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "jurisdiction": lambda s, o: f"{s} has jurisdiction over {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"the inhabitants of {s} are known as {o}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": lambda s, o: f"{s} operates {o} helicopters",
        "transportAircraft": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses {o} as transport aircraft",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"the currency of {s} is {o}",
        "headquarter": lambda s, o: f"{s} is headquartered at {o}",
        "class": lambda s, o: f"{s} belongs to the class {o}",
        "division": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the division {o}",
        "order": lambda s, o: f"{s} belongs to the order {o}",
        "regionServed": lambda s, o: f"{s} serves the region of {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"the leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "hubAirport": lambda s, o: f"{s} has its hub at {o}",
        "aircraftFighter": lambda s, o: f"{s} operates {o} fighter aircraft",
        "attackAircraft": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses {o} as attack aircraft",
        "battle": lambda s, o: f"{s} participated in the {o}",
        "chief": lambda s, o: f"the chief of {s} is {o}",
        "foundedBy": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded by {o}",
        "postalCode": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the postal code {o}",
        "areaCode": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the area code {o}",
        "foundingYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded in {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the ceremonial county of {o}",
    }

    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_triples = defaultdict(list)
    for triple in triples:
        subject_triples[triple.subject].append(triple)

    # Find primary subject (airport if possible)
    primary_subject = triples[0].subject
    for subj in subject_triples:
        if "Airport" in subj or "airport" in subj:
            primary_subject = subj
            break

    parts = []
    used = set()

    # Process primary subject first
    for triple in subject_triples[primary_subject]:
        pred = triple.predicate
        obj = triple.object
        if pred in predicate_templates:
            parts.append(predicate_templates[pred](triple.subject, obj))
        else:
            parts.append(f"{triple.subject} has {pred} of {obj}")
        used.add(id(triple))

    # Process remaining subjects
    for subj, subj_triples in subject_triples.items():
        if subj == primary_subject:
            continue
        for triple in subj_triples:
            if id(triple) in used:
                continue
            pred = triple.predicate
            obj = triple.object
            if pred in predicate_templates:
                parts.append(predicate_templates[pred](triple.subject, obj))
            else:
                parts.append(f"{triple.subject} has {pred} of {obj}")
            used.add(id(triple))

    if not parts:
        t = triples[0]
        return f"The {t.predicate} of {t.subject} is {t.object}."

    if len(parts) == 1:
        return parts[0] + "."

    # Join parts into a coherent sentence without lowercasing entity names
    sentence = parts[0]
    for i, part in enumerate(parts[1:], start=1):
        sentence += ", where " + part if i == 1 else ", and " + part
    sentence += "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

        obj = triple.object

            parts.append(f"{triple.subject} has {pred} of {obj}")

            else:
                parts.append(f"{triple.subject} has {pred} of {obj}")
            used.add(id(triple))

    if not parts:
        t = triples[0]
        return f"The {t.predicate} of {t.subject} is {t.object}."

    if len(parts) == 1:
        return parts[0] + "."

    # Join parts into a coherent sentence without lowercasing entity names
    sentence = parts[0]
    for i, part in enumerate(parts[1:], start=1):
        sentence += ", where " + part if i == 1 else ", and " + part
    sentence += "."
    return sentence

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""

    from collections import defaultdict

    by_subject = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        by_subject[t.subject].append(t)

    primary_subject = triples[0].subject
    for s in by_subject:
        if "airport" in s.lower():
            primary_subject = s
            break

    def clean_language(x: str) -> str:
        if x.lower().endswith(" language"):
            return x[:-9]
        return x

    def short_subject_for_country(s: str, country_obj: str) -> str:
        if ", " in s:
            left, right = s.rsplit(", ", 1)
            if right.strip().lower() == country_obj.strip().lower():
                return left.strip()
        return s

    def render(t: Triple) -> str:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object

        if p == "cityServed":
            return f"{s} serves the city of {o}"
        if p == "location":
            return f"the location of {s} is {o}"
        if p == "country":
            return f"{short_subject_for_country(s, o)} is in {o}"
        if p == "isPartOf":
            return f"{s} is part of {o}"
        if p == "language":
            return f"the language spoken in {s} is {clean_language(o)}"
        if p == "officialLanguage":
            return f"the official language of {s} is {clean_language(o)}"

        if p == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
            return f"the first runway at {s} is made of {o}"
        if p == "2ndRunwaySurfaceType":
            return f"the second runway at {s} is made of {o}"
        if p == "3rdRunwaySurfaceType":
            return f"the third runway at {s} is made of {o}"
        if p == "4thRunwaySurfaceType":
            return f"the fourth runway at {s} is made of {o}"
        if p == "5thRunwaySurfaceType":
            return f"the fifth runway at {s} is made of {o}"

        templates = {
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": f"{s} has an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": f"{s} has an elevation of {o} feet above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": f"{s} has an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
            "operatingOrganisation": f"{s} is operated by {o}",
            "runwayLength": f"the runway length of {s} is {o}",
            "runwayName": f"{s} has a runway named {o}",
            "runwaySurfaceType": f"{s} has a runway surface type of {o}",
            "1stRunwayLengthFeet": f"{s} has a first runway length of {o} feet",
            "1stRunwayLengthMetre": f"{s} has a first runway length of {o} metres",
            "1stRunwayNumber": f"{s} has a first runway numbered {o}",
            "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": f"{s} has a third runway length of {o} feet",
            "4thRunwayLengthFeet": f"{s} has a fourth runway length of {o} feet",
            "5thRunwayNumber": f"{s} has a fifth runway numbered {o}",
            "icaoLocationIdentifier": f"{s} has the ICAO location identifier {o}",
            "iataLocationIdentifier": f"{s} has the IATA location identifier {o}",
            "locationIdentifier": f"{s} has the location identifier {o}",
            "nativeName": f"{s} is natively known as {o}",
            "leaderParty": f"{s} is led by the {o}",
            "capital": f"the capital of {s} is {o}",
            "leader": f"the leader of {s} is {o}",
            "owner": f"{s} is owned by {o}",
            "largestCity": f"the largest city of {s} is {o}",
            "countySeat": f"the county seat of {s} is {o}",
            "administrativeArrondissement": f"{s} is in the administrative arrondissement of {o}",
            "mayor": f"the mayor of {s} is {o}",
            "city": f"{s} is based in {o}",
            "jurisdiction": f"{s} has jurisdiction over {o}",
            "demonym": f"the inhabitants of {s} are known as {o}",
            "aircraftHelicopter": f"{s} operates {o} helicopters",
            "transportAircraft": f"{s} uses {o} as transport aircraft",
            "currency": f"the currency of {s} is {o}",
            "headquarter": f"{s} is headquartered at {o}",
            "class": f"{s} belongs to the class {o}",
            "division": f"{s} is in the division {o}",
            "order": f"{s} belongs to the order {o}",
            "regionServed": f"{s} serves the region of {o}",
            "leaderTitle": f"the leader title of {s} is {o}",
            "hubAirport": f"{s} has its hub at {o}",
            "aircraftFighter": f"{s} operates {o} fighter aircraft",
            "attackAircraft": f"{s} uses {o} as attack aircraft",
            "battle": f"{s} participated in the {o}",
            "chief": f"the chief of {s} is {o}",
            "foundedBy": f"{s} was founded by {o}",
            "postalCode": f"{s} has the postal code {o}",
            "areaCode": f"{s} has the area code {o}",
            "foundingYear": f"{s} was founded in {o}",
            "ceremonialCounty": f"{s} is in the ceremonial county of {o}",
        }
        return templates.get(p, f"{s} has {p} of {o}")

    used = set()
    parts = []

    # Build a richer chained clause for airport location/cityServed when possible.
    for t in by_subject[primary_subject]:
        if t.predicate not in {"location", "cityServed"}:
            continue
        loc = t.object
        base = render(t)
        used.add(id(t))

        loc_part = None
        loc_country = None
        for lt in by_subject.get(loc, []):
            if lt.predicate == "isPartOf" and loc_part is None:
                loc_part = lt.object
                used.add(id(lt))
            elif lt.predicate == "country" and loc_country is None:
                loc_country = lt.object
                used.add(id(lt))

        if loc_part and loc_country:
            base += f", part of {loc_part}, in {loc_country}"
        elif loc_part:
            base += f", part of {loc_part}"
        elif loc_country:
            base += f", in {loc_country}"

        if loc_country:
            for ct in by_subject.get(loc_country, []):
                if ct.predicate in {"language", "officialLanguage"}:
                    base += f" where the language is {clean_language(ct.object)}"
                    used.add(id(ct))
                    break

        parts.append(base)
        break

    # Add remaining primary-subject facts first.
    for t in by_subject[primary_subject]:
        if id(t) not in used:
            parts.append(render(t))
            used.add(id(t))

    # Add all remaining facts.
    for s, tlist in by_subject.items():
        if s == primary_subject:
            continue
        for t in tlist:
            if id(t) not in used:
                parts.append(render(t))
                used.add(id(t))

    if not parts:
        return render(triples[0]) + "."
    if len(parts) == 1:
        return parts[0] + "."

    sentence = parts[0]
    if len(parts) == 2:
        sentence += " and " + parts[1]
    else:
        sentence += ", " + ", ".join(parts[1:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
    return sentence + "."
